label: FAIL
rationale: The target step successfully sets SecretProtect column 1 (Table). The supplied SecretProtect metadata identifies column 1 as Table, and core/5.3.2.8.2 says the Table column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host, so a successful host Set is not protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target step successfully sets SecretProtect column 2 (ColumnNumber). The supplied SecretProtect metadata identifies column 2 as ColumnNumber, and core/5.3.2.8.3 says the ColumnNumber column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host, so accepting the Set is not protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target step successfully sets SecretProtect column 3 (ProtectMechanisms). The supplied SecretProtect metadata identifies column 3 as ProtectMechanisms, and core/5.3.2.8.4 says that column SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host, so a successful host Set is not protocol-compliant.
